scarcity_wording: Scarce offensive engine archetype; earlier disciplined offers can be justified when comp support is credible.
Valuable scoring frontcourt archetype, but price discipline still matters because replacement is not impossible.
Useful middle-class wing archetype; offers should stay disciplined unless other evidence is unusually strong.
Functional but more replaceable interior archetype; market evidence should be treated conservatively.
Highly replaceable low-opportunity archetype; avoid paying ahead of weak evidence.
